Code Audit Report — glib

Generated 2026-06-13 —
glib
Structured audit of GLib (glib/gobject/gio/gmodule/girepository). ~100% of hand-written non-test product code reviewed across ~460 files (portable core + CLI tools + deprecated modules + all major platform backends: linux/posix, inotify, kqueue, and the win32/osx backends). Only deliberately-excluded code remains unaudited: vendored libraries (cmph/gnulib/libcharset/win_iconv/dirent), generated files (gmarshal/gunichartables), and the test suites under */tests/.
🔗 https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/glibbranch maincommit 303b0dff4e
